name: Smono 70's Vaporizer
summary: A compact OLED-screen dry-herb vaporiser with a retro design, for discreet portable use.
description: The Smono 70's is a compact portable vaporiser with an old-school OLED screen that shows battery life and temperature so you always know where you stand. The chunky, retro-inspired design is stylish but still small enough to be discreet on the go. USB-C charging and a simple kit — cleaning brush, filling tool and spare screens — come in the box. It suits a patient who wants a straightforward, pocketable device with clear readouts and no app to learn. A 2-year warranty applies, extendable by a year if you register within 90 days.
